nodes.label: Action Ring PRD - full product requirements document (Draft v1.0, July 14 2026)
F1 - Ring Overlay (core surface)
F2 - Trigger System
F3 - Actions (assignable to any bubble)
F4 - Folders (nesting)
F5 - Adjustment Bar (analog actions)
F6 - Contextual Per-App Profiles
F7 - Configuration & Editor UI
F8 - Plugins & Presets (app integrations)
F9 - Storage, Sync & Offline Behavior
F10 - Performance & Reliability
F11 - Privacy, Security & Distribution
F12 - Accessibility & Localization
F1.1 [P0]: Render radial overlay of round action bubbles centered on cursor, on any monitor, topmost/click-through-exempt, equidistant spacing
F1.2 [P0][delta]: Default bubble count 8; count configurable per profile 2-12 (Logitech hard-caps at 8; community request #4)
F1.3 [P0]: Each bubble shows icon + hover text label; hovered bubble highlights via scale + accent color
F1.4 [P0]: Ring stays open until selection, re-trigger, Esc, or click-outside; selecting fires action and closes ring (folders excepted)
F1.5 [P0]: Two activation gestures matching Logitech - click-release and press-hold-release, both work without configuration
F1.6 [P1][delta]: Marking-menu quick select (Kando-style) - directional flick selects bubble before overlay finishes rendering
F1.7 [P0/P1]: Three ring sizes Small/Medium/Large set globally (P0, parity with Options+ v2.4); continuous scale slider 75-150% (P1)
F1.8 [P0]: Overlay opacity configurable, default >=95% with high-contrast theme option
F1.9 [P1]: Open/close animation ~120ms scale/fade, disableable via OS reduce-motion setting
F1.10 [P0]: Multi-monitor and per-monitor DPI aware; clamp ring position at screen edges so it is never clipped
F1.11 [P1]: Explicit fullscreen/exclusive-app behavior - suppress ring by default or render borderless-topmost per-profile (fixes Logitech's silent fail over fullscreen apps)
F1.12 [P2]: Theming - user-selectable light/dark/auto + accent, custom theme files (colors, bubble shape, fonts) a la Kando
F2.1 [P0/P1]: Trigger sources - any mouse button incl. side buttons (P0) via low-level hook; keyboard hotkey (P0); mouse gesture/double-modifier taps (P1)
F2.2 [P0]: 'Show Action Ring' is a mappable action; multiple simultaneous triggers allowed (e.g. mouse button AND hotkey)
F2.3 [P0]: Mouse-button trigger swallows its original event (no click leaks); un-mapping fully restores default behavior

F2.4 [P0][delta]: True disable - first-class global toggle (tray menu + hotkey + assignable action) fully disarms all triggers (Logitech's only mechanism, remap to 'Do nothing', still pops empty ring; community request #1)
F2.5 [P1][delta]: Game mode - auto-disable when a blocklisted process or exclusive-fullscreen app is foreground; tray icon reflects armed/disarmed state (community request #2)
F2.6 [P1]: Debounce/sensitivity - configurable minimum hold time 0-500ms before ring opens, fixes MX Master 4's #1 hardware complaint (accidental triggers) in software
F3.1 [P0]: Keystroke action - send any single shortcut via key-capture field; must support media keys and OS keys

F3.2 [P0][delta]: Keystroke sequence - ordered multi-chord sequences in one action with per-step delay (e.g. Excel Alt+A,C; AutoCAD R,O,Enter); Logitech cannot do this in one action (community request #6)
F3.3 [P0]: Open application - launch or focus-if-running ('switch to' semantics)
F3.4 [P0]: Open folder/file/URL - folder-open must be instant for network paths via async spawn (Logitech's implementation blocks up to 20s on network drives)
F3.5 [P0/P1]: Run command - arbitrary command line with run-hidden/run-as-admin flags (P0); inline script actions PowerShell/AppleScript/bash stored in profile (P1)

F3.6 [P0]: System actions parity list - copy/paste/undo/redo/cut, screenshot, volume, media controls, brightness, lock, sleep displays, show desktop, window snap, new note, emoji picker, clipboard-history picker, app switcher, virtual-desktop nav, zoom, OS search

F3.7 [P0/P1][delta]: Multi-Action macro - ordered list of actions with inter-step delays and type-text steps; P1 conditions (if app running/window title matches); Esc aborts a running macro (community request #13)
F3.8 [P1]: Text snippet - paste a stored text block (Radial-style; not in Logitech's ring)
F3.9 [P1]: AI launcher - open a chosen AI chat, optionally passing current selection/clipboard as URL-encoded prompt (parity with 'Explore AI' default bubble, superset via prompt passing)
F3.10 [P1]: Switch profile action (jump to named profile or General) and Do-nothing placeholder action
F3.11 [P2]: Device switch (Easy-Switch equivalent) where device SDKs allow (e.g. logi HID++ or generic Bluetooth profile switching); omit gracefully otherwise
F3.12 [P2][delta]: Dynamic bubbles - contents computed at open time: 'open windows' ring (Alt-Tab style, community request #7), 'recent files', 'clipboard history top 8'
F4.1 [P0]: Any bubble can be a Folder with up to 9 sub-bubbles (8x9=72 actions); clicking a folder expands sub-bubbles in place with back affordance
F4.2 [P1][delta]: Nesting depth configurable up to 3 levels (Logitech allows exactly 1; Kando proves deeper nesting works)
F4.3 [P0][delta]: Actions can be removed from folders, reordered, and moved between folders/top level in the editor (Logitech cannot delete-from-folder; community request #9)
F4.4 [P0]: Folders have their own editable name and icon
F5.1 [P0]: Adjustment action binds a continuous parameter (volume, brightness, zoom, scroll, or plugin parameter) to relative input; scroll wheel adjusts value while hovering bubble
F5.2 [P0]: Click-and-drag on an adjustment bubble reveals a horizontal adjustment bar; dragging right/left changes value continuously (full parity with Logitech's drag behavior)
F5.3 [P0][delta]: Current numeric value displayed during adjustment (e.g. '68%') - Logitech shows none (community request #8)
F5.4 [P1]: Per-action adjustment sensitivity setting (parity with v1.98) and optional snap/step values
F5.5 [P1]: Generic 'keystroke pair' adjustment - map wheel-up/wheel-down while hovering to two shortcuts (e.g. [ / ] for brush size) so any app gains analog control without a plugin
F6.1 [P0/P1/P2]: Detect foreground application at trigger time by process name (P0); also window-title regex for browser-based apps (P1); URL matching via browser extensions (P2)
F6.2 [P0]: Unlimited named profiles; each holds its own ring layout (bubbles, folders, count); profiles listed as tabs in the editor
F6.3 [P0]: Create a profile from blank, duplicate of General, or a bundled preset; 'Add application' flow lists running/installed apps + browse-to-exe
F6.4 [P1]: Profile import/export as a single shareable file (parity with v2.1 import; superset: export too, enabling community sharing without a marketplace)
F6.5 [P1]: Per-profile overrides - bubble count, ring size, fullscreen behavior, trigger hold-time
F7.1 [P0]: Settings/editor app with live ring preview - drag-and-drop actions from a searchable categorized picker (System/Apps/Macros/Plugins) onto bubbles; drag to reorder; drag off to remove
F7.2 [P0]: Per-bubble settings - rename, choose icon, configure action parameters
F7.3 [P0/P1]: Icon system - bundled icon set (>=300 glyphs), auto-extracted app icons, user-supplied PNG/SVG with validation (P0); icon editor and installable icon packs (P1)
F7.4 [P1]: Undo/redo in the editor; changes apply live (next ring open uses new layout, no restart)
F7.5 [P0]: First-run onboarding - 3-step tour (pick trigger -> try ring -> open editor) and default General profile demonstrating value immediately
F7.6 [P1]: Settings search; keyboard-navigable editor; system tray icon with quick actions (enable/disable, open editor, switch profile, quit)

F8.1 [P0]: Bundled preset profiles for 15 apps (Chrome/Edge/Firefox, Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Photoshop, Premiere Pro, Lightroom Classic, DaVinci Resolve, Figma, VS Code, Teams, Zoom, Slack, Spotify, File Explorer/Finder) built from documented shortcut sets, no host-app SDK needed

F8.2 [P1]: Plugin SDK v1 (declarative) - JSON manifest + icon assets defining actions and app-match rule; installing a plugin auto-creates its contextual profile (parity with Logi Marketplace behavior)
F8.3 [P2]: Plugin SDK v2 (programmatic) - local IPC (named pipe/WebSocket) so a plugin process can expose live actions and receive adjustment deltas, sandboxed and permission-prompted
F8.4 [P2]: In-app gallery browsing a static signed GitHub-hosted index of community presets/plugins/icon packs, works read-only, degrades gracefully offline, no account required
F9.1 [P0]: All configuration is local human-readable JSON under user profile dir, written atomically; corrupted files backed up and regenerated, never silently reset

F9.2 [P0][delta]: 100% offline operation of every core feature (ring, actions, editor, presets) - Logitech's ring + Smart Actions officially require an active internet connection (#3 community request)
F9.3 [P1]: Automatic local config backups (last 10 versions) + one-click full backup/restore file
F9.4 [P2]: Optional folder-based sync (Dropbox/OneDrive/Syncthing) - no proprietary cloud
F10.1 [P0][delta]: Trigger-to-visible-ring latency <100ms p99 including first invocation after boot/sleep (Logitech's 10-20s cold start is the #1 community complaint)
F10.2 [P0]: Idle footprint <=50MB RAM, <=0.1% CPU, zero network; single background process (Options+ runs 3+ processes, documented battery drain)
F10.3 [P0]: Action execution starts <=50ms after bubble selection; as fast as a direct button binding (a measured Logitech regression)

F10.4 [P0][delta]: Watchdog & crash recovery - overlay process restarts silently <=2s; hooks re-register after resume-from-sleep/Explorer restart; no 'works once then dies until reboot' (documented Options+ v2.4 bug)
F10.5 [P1]: Diagnostics page - hook status, last-trigger latency, per-action success log; a 'restart engine' button that actually works (Options+'s restart hangs in a loop for many users)
F10.6 [P1]: Known-conflict handling - detect focus-follows-mouse tools/password-manager overlays injecting ghost clicks (documented AutoRaise conflict) and warn with guidance
F11.1 [P0]: No telemetry by default; optional anonymous usage stats strictly opt-in with visible data list; no ads, no account, no bundled software (documented Options+ grievances)
F11.2 [P0]: Signed installer (MSI/MSIX + notarized DMG later); silent-install flags for corporate deployment; no admin needed to run

F11.3 [P1]: Minimal OS permissions requested lazily with explanation (macOS: Accessibility only, never Screen Recording unless screenshot action used) - Options+'s permission sprawl is a documented IT blocker
F11.4 [P1]: Updates - manual check by default, optional auto-update; updater must not run persistently
F12.1 [P1]: Full keyboard operation of ring (arrow keys/numbers select, Enter fires, Esc closes); screen-reader labels on bubbles; respects OS reduce-motion and high-contrast modes
F12.2 [P2]: Localization framework + top-10 languages; correct shortcut handling across keyboard layouts (Logitech had to patch non-US layouts for its plugins)
T0.1 [M0, Effort M]: Write engineering design doc - process model (background engine + overlay + editor), config schema v1, IPC choice
T0.2 [M0, Effort M]: Framework spike - measure overlay show-latency native Win32/D2D vs Tauri vs Electron; pick stack (decides R2)
T0.3 [M0, Effort M]: Low-level input POC - global mouse+keyboard hooks (WH_MOUSE_LL/WH_KEYBOARD_LL or Raw Input), swallow XBUTTON events, re-inject when unarmed
T0.4 [M0, Effort S]: Input injection POC - SendInput for chords/sequences/unicode text; verify against elevated windows (UIPI limits documented)
T0.5 [M0, Effort S]: Foreground-app detection POC - process name + window title on trigger incl. UWP apps; measure cost
T0.6 [M0, Effort M]: CI setup - build, unit tests, signed nightly artifact; ARM64 build target from day one
T1.1 [M1, Effort L]: Background engine service - startup, tray icon, config load/watch, atomic JSON persistence
T1.2 [M1, Effort L]: Trigger system - mouse-button + hotkey triggers, arm/disarm, global toggle, event swallowing
T1.3 [M1, Effort XL]: Overlay renderer - pre-warmed topmost window, 8-bubble radial layout at cursor, hover highlight, labels, sizes S/M/L, DPI/multi-monitor clamping
T1.4 [M1, Effort M]: Both activation gestures - click-release and press-hold-release selection
T1.5 [M1, Effort L]: Action framework + executors - keystroke, keystroke sequence, open app/folder/file/URL, run command, do-nothing
T1.6 [M1, Effort M]: Input-safety test matrix - drag ops, RDP, VMs, elevated apps, games, multiple mice; fix leaks (mitigates R3)
T1.7 [M1, Effort L]: System actions pack - clipboard, media, volume, screenshot, window management, lock, emoji, clipboard history
T1.8 [M1, Effort M]: Multi-Action macro engine with delays + type-text steps
T1.9 [M1, Effort M]: Folders - data model, in-ring expansion, back navigation
T1.10 [M1, Effort M]: Contextual profiles - General + per-app by process name, profile resolution at trigger time
T1.11 [M1, Effort L]: Minimal editor v0 - profile list, bubble grid, action picker (list-based), rename/icon-from-exe
T1.12 [M1, Effort M]: Performance harness - automated trigger-to-pixel latency measurement, cold-start test after simulated sleep, RAM/CPU budget gate in CI
T1.13 [M1, Effort M]: Watchdog + resume-from-sleep hook re-registration + crash recovery
T2.1 [M2, Effort L]: Adjustment actions - scroll-wheel-on-hover, click-drag adjustment bar, live numeric value display, volume/brightness/zoom built-ins
T2.2 [M2, Effort XL]: Full editor - drag-and-drop from categorized searchable picker, drag-reorder/remove, folder editing incl. remove-from-folder
T2.3 [M2, Effort M]: Icon system - bundled glyph set, exe icon extraction, PNG/SVG import with validation
T2.4 [M2, Effort M]: Onboarding flow + default General profile
T2.5 [M2, Effort M]: Game mode + fullscreen detection + per-profile fullscreen policy + trigger hold-time debounce
T2.6 [M2, Effort L]: Bundled presets - author + verify 15 app preset profiles
T2.7 [M2, Effort S]: Opacity/high-contrast setting, open/close animation with reduce-motion
T2.8 [M2, Effort M]: Diagnostics page - hook status, latency stats, action log, engine restart
T2.9 [M2, Effort M]: Signed installer (MSI/MSIX), silent-install flags, autostart registration, clean uninstall
T2.10 [M2, Effort L]: Beta program - crash reporting (opt-in), feedback channel, fix cycle to >=99.5% crash-free
T2.11 [M2, Effort S]: ARM64 validation pass (Logitech's black-rectangle bug class) + Win10 21H2 compatibility pass
T3.1 [M3, Effort M]: Marking-menu flick selection
T3.2 [M3, Effort M]: Configurable bubble count 2-12 + per-profile overrides
T3.3 [M3, Effort M]: Nesting to 3 levels
T3.4 [M3, Effort M]: Profile import/export file format + UI
T3.5 [M3, Effort L]: Plugin SDK v1 - manifest schema, loader, auto-profile creation, docs + 2 sample plugins
T3.6 [M3, Effort M]: Text snippets, AI launcher with selection/clipboard prompt passing, switch-profile action
T3.7 [M3, Effort M]: Macro conditions + Esc-cancels-macro
T3.8 [M3, Effort M]: Keystroke-pair generic adjustments + per-action sensitivity
T3.9 [M3, Effort M]: Accessibility - keyboard ring navigation, screen-reader labels, high-contrast audit
T3.10 [M3, Effort S]: Local config backups + restore; conflict-tool detection warnings
T3.11 [M3, Effort S]: Window-title/regex app matching
T4.1 [M4, Effort XL]: macOS port - NSEvent taps, Accessibility onboarding, notarized DMG (single permission)
T4.2 [M4, Effort XL]: Plugin SDK v2 - IPC protocol, sandboxing, permission prompts; Photoshop/OBS reference plugins
T4.3 [M4, Effort L]: Dynamic bubbles - open-windows ring, recent files, clipboard top-8
T4.4 [M4, Effort L]: Community gallery - signed static index, in-app browse/install of presets/plugins/icon packs
T4.5 [M4, Effort M]: Theme engine + theme file format
T4.6 [M4, Effort S]: Folder-based sync support + docs
T4.7 [M4, Effort M]: Research - Windows 11 Advanced Haptics for compatible mice; HID++ Easy-Switch feasibility
T4.8 [M4, Effort L]: Localization framework + top-10 languages; layout-aware shortcut handling
M0 - Spike (wk 1-2): tech decisions + overlay/hook proofs of concept. Exit: <100ms overlay POC on Win10/11 incl. ARM64
M1 - MVP (wk 3-8): F1 core, F2.1-2.4, F3.1-3.7, F4.1/4.3/4.4, F6.1-6.3, F7 basic editor, F9.1-9.2, F10 targets. Exit: daily-drivable, all P0s demoable, perf budgets green
M2 - v1.0 public (wk 9-14): F5 adjustments, F7 full editor+onboarding+icons, F8.1 presets, F2.5-2.6, installer/signing, diagnostics. Exit: all P0 complete, crash-free >=99.5% in beta
M3 - v1.x (wk 15-22): P1 set - marking menus, deeper nesting, profile import/export, plugin SDK v1, snippets, AI launcher, accessibility. Exit: P1 complete, community preset sharing live
M4 - v2 (later): macOS port, plugin SDK v2, dynamic bubbles, gallery, themes, haptics research

Persona: Office/Excel power user - top-level Copy/Paste/Clipboard history/Screenshot; Excel folder (Create Table, Create Pivot, monthly-report macro opening 5 URLs+workbook); window-management folder; company-app folder

Persona: Creative pro (Photoshop/Premiere/Resolve) - per-app rings; brush size +/- and undo/redo history scrubbing via dial; Remove/Paste attributes, Nest, razor, workspace switching, export presets; adjustment sliders for brightness/contrast/exposure
Persona: CAD drafter - ring as app/file launcher (taskbar hidden); 'keystroke-then-Enter' commands (AutoCAD R,O,Enter)
Persona: Developer/multi-PC user - device/desktop switching, terminal commands via Run, AI chat launcher, scripts (AppleScript/PowerShell) on bubbles
Persona: Meetings user - Teams/Zoom ring: mute mic, share screen, chat, reactions, camera toggle

Competitor: Logitech Actions Ring (reference product) - polished drag-drop GUI, contextual plugins, analog adjustment bars, Smart Actions macros, signed installer, hardware trigger+haptics on MX Master 4; weaknesses: requires Logitech hardware+internet+account, 10-20s cold-start, fragile LogiPluginService, 8-slot/1-level-folder cap, no disable toggle/game mode, heavy background processes, telemetry concerns

Competitor: Kando (OSS, Win/mac/Linux) - unlimited nesting, marking-menu gesture selection, themes, offline, free; weaknesses: Electron footprint, no analog adjustment bars, no plugin marketplace, config heavy
Competitor: Radial (AppVerge, macOS) - sub-menus, visual macro editor, shell scripts, Apple Shortcuts, preset marketplace; weaknesses: Mac-only, paid
Competitor: Pie Menu / Pieoneer / Cirmenu (macOS) - menu-bar harvesting (Pie Menu), polish (Pieoneer); weaknesses: narrow action types, Mac-only
Competitor: AutoHotPie / AHK Radial / GestureSign (Windows) - free, fully scriptable; weaknesses: AHK runtime often banned in corporate environments, no polished GUI
Competitor: Elgato Virtual Stream Deck (Win/mac) - more slots/layouts, Shortcuts/Keyboard Maestro macros; weaknesses: requires Stream Deck hardware, grid not radial
R1: Low-level mouse hooks are flagged by some anti-cheat systems. Mitigation: game mode (F2.5) disarms hooks per-process; document clearly

R2: Framework choice - native (Win32/WinUI, ~10MB, fastest) vs Electron/Tauri (faster UI dev, heavier). Recommend Tauri or native shell for overlay + web-tech editor; overlay latency budget rules out Electron for the ring itself. Decide in T0.2
R3: Swallowing a mouse button globally can break edge cases (drag operations, RDP, virtualization). Mitigation: extensive input-matrix testing (T1.6); passthrough allowlist
R4: Trademark - 'Actions Ring' is Logitech's marketing name. Mitigation: ship under a distinct name/brand; 'Action Ring' as working title only, legal review before launch
R5: Preset shortcut sets rot as host apps update (documented Logitech pain). Mitigation: presets are data-only JSON -> hot-fixable via gallery; community PRs
R6: macOS Accessibility-permission friction. Mitigation: phase 2; polished permission onboarding, single permission only
Q1: Monetization open question - free/OSS core + paid pro? one-time license? Open, does not block v1 build
Q2: Do we pursue Logitech-device deep integration (HID++ for Easy-Switch/haptics)? Deferred to P2 (F3.11); investigate legality/SDK access
Goal 1: Ship a radial overlay functionally equivalent to Logitech's Actions Ring - 8 bubbles, folders, adjustment bars, contextual per-app profiles, drag-and-drop configuration, plugin actions
Goal 2: Work with any mouse/keyboard (mappable trigger: any mouse button, keyboard hotkey, or gesture) - no hardware lock-in
Goal 3: Be offline-first - zero internet requirement for any core feature; local JSON config; optional cloud sync only as opt-in

Goal 4: Beat Logitech on the community's top complaints - instant invocation (<100ms always incl. first use after wake), real enable/disable toggle + game mode, configurable slot count, multi-keystroke sequences, light resource usage
Non-Goal 1 (v1): Hardware haptic feedback - requires device firmware; consider Windows 11 Advanced Haptics API as a v2 stretch
Non-Goal 2 (v1): Cloud marketplace with paid content; v1 ships a curated local plugin/preset gallery instead
Non-Goal 3 (v1): ChatGPT-account-integrated AI Prompt Builder clone; v1 exposes 'AI launcher' and 'prompt-to-URL' actions only
Non-Goal 4 (v1): Mobile/iPadOS support
Concept: cold-start latency - Logitech's Actions Ring takes 10-20s to respond after wake/boot, the #1 documented community complaint; drives the <100ms p99 requirement
Concept: 8-slot cap - Logitech hard-caps the ring at 8 bubbles with 1-level folders (72 actions max); community request #4 for more slots
Concept: no disable toggle - Logitech's only mechanism is remapping the trigger to 'Do nothing', which still pops an empty ring for some users; community request #1
Concept: fragile LogiPluginService - works-once-then-dies bugs in Logitech's background service require reboot to fix; drives watchdog/diagnostics requirements

hyperedges.label: Delta [delta] Requirements Answering Documented Community Complaints
Competitive Positioning: Logitech polish + Kando openness/depth/offline-first

Phase 4 v2 and Beyond (M4) Task Set
